summary: PHASE 13.4 Factor Ranker comprehensive backend testing completed successfully. All 14 specified endpoints tested and working correctly. 1236 factors evaluated with 105 approved (4 STRONG + 101 PROMISING). Family distribution balanced with momentum (49), breakout (29), regime (16), microstructure (4), correlation (4), volume (2), structure (1). All metrics (IC, Sharpe, Stability, Decay, Regime Consistency) functioning properly.
